mentals.text: MIND. ► Emotional. ► Very easily excited ; hod hands even from speaking, [1] . ► Fanciful raving at night, [1] . ►► *Sadness, with thoughts of nothing but death (eleventh day), [1] . ►► *Sad, despondent ; she was obliged to weep , [1] . ► Gloomy mood (fourth day), [1] . ► *Dejected, sad mood (after seventy-two hours), [1] . ► Dejected, with great heaviness of the feet, [1] . ► Completely depressed in mind, together with great anxiety, lasting until lying down in the evening, [1] . ► Oppression , [1] . [10.] ► Oppression, with anxiety, and a very unpleasant sensation in the stomach, [1] . ► Very much inclined to grieve and cry in the evening, whilst in the forenoon she had laughed about every trifle, contrary to her habit, [1] . ► *Grief about the slightest occurrences, even to despair , [1] . ► Weeping in a child, with fretfulness, [2] . ► He was obliged to weep, without cause, in the evening, [1] . ► She was obliged to weep at music, [1] . ► Anxiety, with headache, vertigo, and ill-humor, [1] . ► Anxiety and hastiness drive him about like an evil-doer, [1] . ► Anxiety, so that she cannot sit, with nausea and sweat, [1] . ► Constant anxiety at night, so that he had no rest in bed; he constantly talked in sleep (twelfth hour), [1] . [20.] ► Great anxiety, so that she trembled all over for some minutes, [1] . ► Great anxiety, in the evening, as if some misfortune had happened, with heat of the face and coldness of hands and feet, [1] . ► At night, after lying down, thoughts full of care, from which she could not free herself, and which were so distressing and anxious that the blood became excited, and she could not sleep the whole night (fifth day), [1] . ► He awoke at 2 A.M. with restless mood; everything that could injure him happened, and made him anxious, so that frequently he did not know where he should turn, for over seven nights (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Hypochondriac uneasiness, discouragement, anxious sweat, loss of sleep, [1] . ► Fearfulness, [1] . ►► *Apprehensiveness, with inclination to weep , in frequent attacks , [4] . ► *Extreme apprehensiveness, so that she did not know how to overcome it , disappearing after weeping, [4] . ► *It frequently seemed to him as though his end were near, or the greatest misfortunes were impending , [1] . ► Timid (after six hours), [1] . [30.] ► Irritable and uneasy, [1] . ► Irritable, violent, in the morning; hypochondriac in the afternoon, [1] . ► He would much rather be alone; every disturbance irritates him, [1] . ► She is very easily angered, but it just as easily passes out of her mind, [1] . ► Fretful, [1] . ► Fretful and hypochondriac, without special cause, [1] . ► *Extremely fretful; everything angers and offends him, [1] . ► Peevish (after three hours), [1] . ► Very peevish and wrathful, [1] . ► Mood in the morning lively, in the evening depressed, [1] . ► Intellectual. [40.] ► At night she was obliged to think of all sorts of things, on account of which she slept very little, [1] . ► At night a fixed idea took possession of him, so that he could not sleep before midnight, [1] . ► Uneasiness and unsteadiness; he had no thought for his work, no inclination for anything; relief after walking in the open air, [1] . ► *Extreme hesitation; she is unable to make up her mind about anything , [1] . ► Slowness of purpose and thought, [1] . ► She was usually very quick to resolve, but soon after taking was very slow of thought and resolution, [1] . ► Incapable of mental work, after the midday nap, lasting four hours, [1] . ► Beclouded mind, [1] . ► Makes mistakes in talking and writing, [1] . ► *Absentminded , [1] . [50.] ► Constant forgetfulness, [1] . ► Extreme forgetfulness (after eight days), [5] . ► Only obscure recollection of the most recent events, [1] . ► Lethargy, [1] .

head.text: HEAD. ► Confusion and Vertigo. ► Confusion of the head, immediately in the morning , with nausea and sour vomiting, [1] . ► Confusion of the forehead, with a contractive sensation, [1] . ► Very great, painful confusion of the head, in the morning, lasting an hour (after four days), [1] . ► Pressive confusion of the head, especially in the morning, [1] . ► Vertigo in the morning on waking (seventh day), [1] , [4] . ► Vertigo in the evening, with stupefaction; she was obliged to lie down, [1] . [60.] ► Vertigo while looking up, [1] . ► *Vertigo during and after stooping , lasting several minutes, even to falling forward, with nausea, [1] . ► Vertigo and dizziness of the whole head, [4] . ► Attacks of vertigo, with inclination to fall forwards, [4] . ► Great vertigo, in the morning, after a good sleep (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Reeling, and inclination to vertigo, with loss of sense, shivering, and chilliness, [1] . ► Reeling, and whirling, in the evening, while walking, [1] . ► Feeling in the head as if intoxicated, [1] . ► General Head. ► Orgasm of blood in the head, with compressive pain in the vertex, in the afternoon, [4] . ► Orgasm and sensation of heat in the head very frequently during the day, with perspiration, [4] . [70.] ► Weakness of the head, extending to the throat, [1] . ► Emptiness of the head after the midday meal, [1] . ► Stupid in the head, in the morning, for three mornings in succession, [1] . ►► *A pain as if the head were numb and pithy , [2] . ► Unpleasant warmth in whole head after dinner, [4] . ► Severe tensive headache on waking from sleep, affecting the whole head, especially on the surface of the brain, mostly in the occiput, without impeding thought with painful stiffness of the neck; the more he tries to fall asleep the worse the pain becomes (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► A sharp, drawing tension in the nerves of the brain, [1] . ►► *Pain as if constricted, especially in the occiput , extending to the nape of the neck, which pains on looking up, as if broken , at noon; afterwards the pain extends down the back and to the chest, [1] . ► Feeling as if the head were screwed together and stuffed full, [1] . ► Headache in the morning, as if she had not slept enough (ninth day), [1] . [80.] ► Headache, in the morning on waking , every morning, for half an hour, [1] . ► Headache at night on the side upon which she was not lying, [1] . ► Headache during and after eating, [1] . ► Headache on moving the head; she dreads to move it, [1] . ► Headache while riding, [1] . ► Headache, on turning the head, for two days, [1] . ► Headache, with nausea, as from the abdomen, a very unpleasant sensation, [1] . ► *Violent headache, with eructations and nausea, during menstruation (after five days), [1] . ► Violent headache, in the morning on waking, with vomiting, diarrha, and icy-cold sweat, even to faintness; she was obliged to lie two days on account of weakness, with constant alternations of chilliness and heat, [1] . ► Violent headache, especially in the evening, during menstruation, [1] . [90.] ► Drawing pain in the head, extending into the face and down to the neck, [1] . ► *Pressive pain in the head (after twenty-four days), [1] . ► Pressive headache here and there in the brain, at last behind the left ear (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Pressive headache during and after eating, [1] . ► Tearing in the head, like rheumatism, in the morning, [1] . ► Bruised pain in the head, with a general sick feeling, in the evening, [1] . ► Trembling and twitching in the head, neck, and right arm, [1] . ► Feeling of looseness of the whole brain, [4] . ► Forehead. ► Sensation as if the forehead were wrinkled, [1] . ► Headache, as if the forehead would burst, after eating, [4] . [100.] ► Dull headache in the forehead and vertex, in the morning in bed, while yet half asleep; when completely awake it had disappeared (ninth days), [5] . ► Drawing in the forehead, for half an hour, recurring several days in succession, [1] . ► Drawing first in the forehead, then in the occiput in the evening, [1] . ► Drawing headache in the forehead, with pain in the nape of the neck, as if it were stiff, [1] . ► Pressure extending from the forehead deep into the brain (after thirty days, [4] . ► Pressure outward at the forehead two hours after eating, [1] . ► Dull pressure in the forehead, in the morning after rising, aggravated by motion, [1] . ► Tearing headache in the forehead, in the morning on waking, lasting an hour, [1] . ► Tearing in the forehead, with sensation of internal heat, in the afternoon, [4] . ► Pain in the forehead, as if torn, lasting from the morning after rising till towards noon, [4] . [110.] ► Smarting pain in the forehead when touched, [1] . ► Throbbing in the forehead, [4] . ► Temples. ► Pressive pain in the left temple, lasting one minute, [1] . ► Sharp, pressive pain in the temple upon which he does not lie in the morning in bed, [1] . ► *Transient stitches in the left temple (after eleven days), [1] . ► Vertex. ► Burning in a small spot on the vertex, [4] . ► Stitches in both sides of the vertex towards the middle, as if the head would burst, from morning till 3 P.M., when the pain disappeared during a profuse perspiration in the heat of the sun, [4] . ► Parietals. ► One-sided headache, in the morning in bed, with inclination to vomit, disappearing on rising, [1] . ► Violent tearing in the right side of the head in the evening (first day), [4] . ► Throbbing in the right side of the head, in the afternoon, recurring for several days, [4] . [120.] ► Painful shocks in the right side of the head, [4] . ► Jerking pain in the right side of the head, [1] . ► Occiput. ► A very violent, dull pain in the occiput, with heaviness of the head, tension, and stiffness of the neck; the pains are intolerable on walking, but are scarcely noticed while lying; during the night the pain disappears (fifteenth day), [6] . ► Pressive headache in the occiput , [1] . ► Much pressure in the occiput and nape of the neck, [1] . ► External Head. ► Some hairs become gray, [1] . ►► *Falling of the hair of the scalp (after thirty-six hours and sixteen days), [1] . ► A constant and remarkable tangling of the hair of the head; although it was combed eight or ten times during the day, it was always combed with difficulty, [6] . ► Lumpy patches on the vertex red and painful , [8] . ►► *Scurfy spots on the vertex, with violent, sore pain when touched , [1] . [130.] ►► Much scaliness on the head, which causes a distressing itching and becomes a scurf, which disappears on washing, and then is humid , [1] . ► *Humid eruption on the head , which does not itch, but pains as if suppurating, only when touched , [1] . ►► *Eruption on the vertex painful to touch and humid , [1] . ► The old scabs on the scalp come off, and have an offensive odor, [2] . ► Coldness and spasmodic constriction of the scalp, [1] . ► Sore pain on the head, [1] . ► Painfulness and moisture beneath the scurfy spots on the head, [2] . ► *Itching on the scalp , [1] . EYE. ► Objective. ► Redness and inflammation of the eyes, with drawing and pressive pain; followed by biting lachrymation, [1] . ► *Redness of the whites of the eyes, lachrymation, and photophobia , [2] . [140.] ► Maturating of the eyes, with pressure in them, and a drawing pain extending into the head, [1] . ► Much hardened mucus in the eyes, [1] . ► Subjective. ► Weakness of the eyes , [1] . ► Weakness and red look to the eyes, [1] . ► Pain in the eyes on opening them, as from exertion by reading, [1] . ► *Heat in the eyes ; he could not see clearly, [1] . ► Heat in the eyes, with some pus in the canthi, [1] . ► *Burning in the eyes , [1] . ► Burning in the eyes, with the evening light (after thirty days), [4] . ► Burning in the eyes and lachrymation in the open air, [1] . [150.] ► Violent burning in the eyes, in the morning, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the eyes, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the eyes , every morning, and also in the evening, [1] . ► If he looks intently at anything white or red, or at the sun, stitches extend from the temples through the eyes to the internal canthi, [1] . ► Violent sticking into the right eye, [4] . ► Biting in the eyes, as if something acrid got into them, [1] . ► Biting pain in the eyes as from something acrid, [4] . ► *Biting in the eyes , with heat in them, [1] . ► Brow and Orbit. ► Coldness above the eyes, [1] . ► Pressure in the right eyebrow, extending thence through the whole eye, [1] . [160.] ► Twitchings beneath the eyes, [1] . ► Lids. ► Swelling of the lids and lachrymal glands, [1] . ► *A stye on the lower lid, with drawing pain before the discharge of pus , [1] . ►► *Dry mucus in the lashes , [1] . ► *Agglutination of the eyes, in the morning , [4] . ► *Red painful inflammation of the lower lid and inner canthus , [1] . ►► *Very inflamed margins of the lids , [1] . ►► *Inflammation of the external canthus , [1] . ► *Heaviness of the lids , [1] . ► Inclination to draw the eyes together in the external canthi, [1] . [170.] ► Paralytic pain in the lids, [1] . ► *Sensation of dryness in the lids, and pressure , [1] . ► *Heat about the lids , [1] . ► Burning and dryness of the lids, in the evening while reading and in the morning, [1] . ► Burning biting in the inner canthus, [4] . ► Itching of the inner canthus, [1] . ► Lachrymal Apparatus. ► *Lachrymation of the eyes frequently , and pressure, [1] . ► Lachrymation and closing of the eyes, as from sleepiness, while walking in the open air, [1] . ► Vision. ► Things are seen as through a fog, [4] . ► Shortsightedness; he is unable to recognize any one at ten paces (after thirteen days), [1] . [180.] ► During menstruation the sight vanishes, it becomes black before the eyes; the left hand becomes numb and dead, with crawling in it extending up the arm, and also with crawling in the lips , [1] . ► On looking at a white object he is blinded, and the eyes water, [1] . ► *Light blinds the eyes , [1] . ► *Intolerance of light; he cannot look at the bright light; with redness of the white of the eye , [1] . ► *Great sensitiveness of the eyes to the daylight , for several days, [1] . ► *The eyes are very sensitive to the sunlight; it causes lachrymation , [4] . ► The eyes are only affected by daylight, not by candlelight; with the latter she can read easily and without difficulty, [1] . ► Double vision of letters while writing, with burning in the eyes, [4] . ► In the evening, with open eyes, he sees fiery zigzags around the border of the field of vision, [1] . ► All sorts of images before the eyes, as soon as she closes them at night, [1] . EAR. ► Objective. [190.] ► Ears red and hot, [1] . ► *Swelling of the glands beneath the ears, with tensive pain , [1] . ► Swelling of the gland beneath the right ear, [1] . ► Swelling within the left ear (after twelve days), [1] . ► Ulceration of the left helix, [5] . ► *Moisture in the ears , [2] . ►► *Moist and sore places behind both ears , [1] . ► *Bloody discharge from the ear , for thirty-six hours, [1] . ► Subjective. ► *Sensation as if a hard body as large as an egg where behind the ear , on turning the head to the left side (ninth day), [4] . ► Feeling of tightness about the left ear (after thirty hours), [1] . [200.] ► Feeling as if the left ear were filled with water, [1] . ► Earache, acute pressure in the inner ear like a twinging pain, [1] . ► *Stitches in the ears , [1] . ► Stitches in the ear, [4] . ► Stitches in the left ear, in the evening after eating, [1] . ► Tearing in the right ear, [1] . ► Ulcerative pain in the left ear, frequently recurring, [1] . ► Frequently a sensation and a report in the ear as though bubbles burst (second day), [1] . ► Beating in the ear slower than the pulse, in the morning after waking, lasting an hour, [1] . ► Beating like the pulse in the ears, especially on stooping and after eating, [1] . [210.] ► Bubbling in the ear, on stooping, with heaviness of the head; on becoming erect or leaning back the bubbling returns, as if something fell before the ear, and then again away from it, [1] . ► Flapping in the ear on every eructation, as if air was forced through the Eustachian tube, [1] . ► Sensation in the right ear, on every step, as if a valve were opening and closing, [4] . ► Itching of the left ear, in the evening, for a quarter of an hour, [1] . ► Hearing. ► The hardness of hearing is better when riding in a wagon, [1] . ► Cracking in the ear, in the evening, when eating, [1] . ► *Cracking in the ear, when moving the jaws , though only in the morning when lying in bed, [1] . ► Crackling in the right ear, on moving the head, [1] . ► Creaking in the ears, [1] . ► Cracking and creaking in the left ear when swallowing, [4] . [220.] ► Hissing in the ears, the whole day, [1] . ► *Humming in the ears , [1] . ► At first ringing, then roaring, in the left ear (after two hours), [1] . ► *Roaring in the head (after three days), [1] . ► Roaring in the head, then crackling in the ears, then more acute hearing, [1] . ► Violent roaring in the ears at night , with stoppage of the ears, at times (at the full moon), [1] . ► Thundering, rolling in the ears, [1] . ► Rushing noise in the ears during coition, [1] . ► Violent rushing and roaring in the ears (after fourteen days), [1] . ► Screaming tone in the ears, in the evening in bed, which shoots through all the limbs (after seven days), [5] . [230.] ► A sound in the vertex like the ticking of a watch , [8] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Graph.

Rush of blood to head with flushed face also with nose bleed and distension and flatulence. Headache in morning on waking, mostly on one side, with inclination to vomit. Sensation of cobweb on forehead. Feels numb and pithy. Rheumatic pains on one side of head, extending to teeth and neck. Burning on vertex. Humid, itching eruption on hairy scalp, emitting a fetid odor. Cataleptic condition

Fatigue in consequence of intellectual labour. Sensation of numbness in the head. Intoxication and vertigo, esp. in the morning on rising, or on awaking (the forehead is contracted, with nausea and vomiting); as well as in the evening, with want to lie down. Confusion in the head. Attacks of headache, sometimes semi-lateral, with nausea and acid vomiting. Feeling of looseness of the whole brain. Violent headache with eructations and nausea, during menstruation. Periodical unilateral headache, with constipation and amenorrhœa. Pain in the head as if the head were numb and pithy. Violent headache in the morning, driving out a cold perspiration, and inducing syncope. Headache from the motion of a carriage, as well as on moving the head, or during and after a meal. Headache on the side which presses the pillow. Tension and pressive constriction in the occiput, with stiffness at the nape of the neck. Intense heavy weight, or dull pressure, in upper part of occiput, with a feeling as if the head were drawn back, obliging him to rest his head; unable to read or work while pain lasts. Sensation of compression and contraction in the forehead. Compressive pain in the vertex in the afternoon, with rotatory movement in the head. Burning on the top of the head on a small spot. Ebullition of blood, with beating and buzzing in the head. Fulness in and congestions to the head, the menstruation being suppressed. Tearing and pulling in the scalp, in the teeth, and in the glands of the neck. Itching in the scalp. Humid scabs on the head. Humid, spreading, scurfy eruption on the top of the head, painful to the touch, as if from subcutaneous ulceration, and emitting a disgusting odour; extending down to sides of the head into the whiskers; after scratching, more sore and humid; later drying up to a white scurf. Sweat on the head, while walking in the open air. Smooth large wens on the hairy scalp; the hairy scalp is very hot, and itches very much, esp. when walking in the open air. Abundant desquamation of the scalp. Falling off of the hair, even on the sides of the head and the whiskers. Rheumatic pains in the scalp, principally in the sides, extending to the teeth and cervical glands; when walking and becoming cold in open air, > from warmth and while getting warm when walking. Perspiration smelling acid or very offensive, colouring the linen yellow; on the head (as on the whole body) at night and during the day, from the least exercise; even while talking, > when walking in the open air. The hair turns grey.

Forehead : pressure deep in ; drawing ; tearing ; bursting. Lancinating pain in right temple, with flickering before eyes and lassitude ; heaviness of eyelids. Transient stitches in left temple. Stinging or stitching pains in temples. Pain from left temple down side of face to shoulder ; face distorted ; left corner of mouth drawn inward and downward. Periodical, unilateral headache ; numbness in left side of head, violent nausea with straining and retching ; obstinate constipation. θ Amenorrhœa. Semilateral headache, early in morning, in bed, with inclination to vomit. Tearing pain in one side of head, in teeth and glands of throat. Throbbing in sides of head. Oppressive headache on top of head. Pressive pain : in vertex ; in occiput. Pain as if constricted, especially in occiput, extending to nape of neck, which pains on looking up, as if broken. Pain as if head were numb and pithy. Pressive pain in head. Violent headache, with eructations and nausea, during menstruation. Frequent congestions to head and chest, dark red cheeks, oppression and anguish when lying down. θ Amenorrhœa. Headache, in morning on waking. Sensation as if skin of forehead was drawn into folds. Scalp feels bruised. Coldness of scalp. Itching on scalp. Sweat on head when walking in open air. Burning round spot on top of head. Lumpy patches on vertex, red and painful. Humid eruption on vertex, painful to touch. Scurfy spots on vertex, with violent sore pain when touched. Much scaliness on head, causing distressing itching, becomes scurf, which disappears on washing, and is then humid. Humid eruption on head, pains as if suppurating, only when touched. Intolerable itching all over body, followed by a moist eruption behind right ear ; crept gradually upwards on right side of scalp, forming pustules, which discharged an acrid, sticky fluid, by which hair stuck together, and finally fell off, leaving a bare spot behind, covered with a mealy dust and small crusts ; felt < after washing ; is very sensitive to cold air ; has chronic lachrymation and fluor albus. Eczema capitis, of entire scalp, forming massive, dirty crusts, which mat the hair together ; painful and sore to touch. Fissured eruption back of and above ears, on cheeks, and about region of posterior fontanelle, exuding a glutinous secretion, forming a scab, and cracking open, itching a little all the time, but excessively before a storm ; perfectly indifferent to any one touching the sore places. Tinea capitis ; eruption dry and scabby, large and confluent, color dark ; cervical glands swollen and hard. Eczema capitis in scrofulous child, infesting entire hairy scalp, and forming massive, dirty crusts, which mat the hair together. Falling out of hair of scalp. Bald places on head perfectly smooth and shining. Circumscribed bald spot on front of head covered with herpes. Porrigo decalvans. Hair falls out, even on sides of head.

face.text: FACE. ► Objective. ► *Paleness of the face , [1] . ► Pale color of the face, with blue rings around the eyes, [1] . ► Sudden paleness of the face, after moderate mental excitement, as for example, reading, [1] . ► Yellowness of the face, with weak eyes, as if exhausted (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Swelling of the left side of the face, in the morning, after rising, [4] . ► Incipient paralysis of the left side of the face after some swelling of it and some toothache; the muscles of the right side of the face suddenly become distorted, the mouth drawn to the right side, and its motion as well as speech impaired; the left eye frequently becomes closed involuntarily, while the right one could not be completely closed, but frequently remained open in bright light, wind, and dust (after eighteen days), [1] . ► Subjective. ►► *Constant sensation as of a cobweb on the face , [4] . [280.] ► Pain alternately in all the bones of the face, [1] . ► Cheeks. ► A kind of cystic swelling of the cheek, [3] . ► Spasmodic twitchings in the masseter muscles, [1] . ► She is unable to close the jaws when eating, on account of pain in the masseter muscles, as if they were paralyzed, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the left upper jaw, [1] . ► *Tearing, very painful, in the left zygoma, so that she had to cry out, in the evening in bed, [4] . ► Lip. ► Blisters as large as poppy seeds on the vermilion border of the lower lip of the left side, which rub off on washing, but form anew after four hours (fourth days), [6] . ► The left corner of the mouth is ulcerated, [1] . ► A scaly painless ulcer in both corners of the mouth, [1] . ► Twitching of the upper lip, [1] . [290.] ► The lips are dry, [1] . ► Burning and a feeling of heaviness in the lower lip, [4] . ► Stitches in the upper lip, as if a needle and thread were drawn through it, in the evening, [4] . ►► *Soreness and cracking of the lips and nostrils, as from cold , [1] . ► Sore pain in the left corner of the mouth [1] . ► Chin. ► Swelling of the glands beneath the chin, [1] . ► Sticking tearing in the left side of the lower jaw, [4] .
Feels as if cobwebs were on it. Eczema of nose. Itching pimples. Moist eczema around mouth and chin. Erysipelas, burning and stinging

Pale yellow complexion, with livid circles under eyes. Flushes of heat in face. Erysipelatous inflammation and swelling of the face (burning and stinging; the erysipelas spreading in rays), with eruption of vesicles. Erysipelas preceded by chills and heat alternating; beginning r. side of face, going to l. Encysted tumour on the cheek. Constant sensation, as if the face were covered with cobweb. Semi-lateral paralysis, and distortion of the muscles of the face, with difficult articulation. Drawing and tearing pains in the bones of the face. Eruption on the face, in appearance as if the skin were raw. Scabs and moist pimples on the face. Ephelis. Falling off of the beard. Ulcers on the internal surface of the lips. Fissures in the ulcerated lips. Ulcerated corner of the mouth. Lips cracked. Scabby eruption on the chin and round the mouth. Painful nodosities in the lower jaw. Swelling and hardness of the submaxillary glands.

Face : pale and haggard ; pale and bloated ; pale and yellow ; chlorotic ; flushed ; eyes sunken. Flushes of heat in face. Dulness with heat in face and head, especially of nose. Constant sensation as of a cobweb on face. Itching blotches on face and other parts of body. Itching pimples on face, becoming moist after scratching. Scabs on face, skin dry ; constipated, large stools. Moist eczema on face. Eczema squamosum on face of fifteen years' duration ; applications had caused the external eruption to recede, the patient suffered with headache, vertigo and a general feeling of debility and loss of appetite. Whole surface of forehead and cheeks red and scurfy ; after vaccination in a child eighteen months old. Rhagades on cheek, running like radii toward corners of mouth ; an infiltrated spot on cheek, is covered with dry scales. Annular raised spots on face. Erysipelas, eruption appearing on cheeks, preceded by chills and heat alternating ; constrictive headache, especially in occiput ; burning, stinging and itching of parts. Erysipelas : of both sides of face, with burning, stinging pain ; of cheeks, preceded by alternating chills and heat ; of left cheek, after mal-application of Iodium for sore of inner nose ; of face, from smell of wood ; commencing on right side and going to left. Freckles. Very painful tearing in left zygoma, so that she had to cry out, in evening in bed. Pain from left temple down left side of face to left shoulder ; face distorted ; left corner of mouth drawn inward and downward, and left lower eyelid hangs down ; after catching cold. Muscles on one side of face contracted ; speech difficult. Rheumatic, peripheric paralysis of face. Hair of whiskers or beard falls out. Upper lip : twitching ; stinging ; swollen ; painful pimples. Heaviness in lower lip. Formication in lips during menses. Dryness of lips, with constant burning ; they crack. Soreness and cracking of lips and nostrils as from cold. Lips chap ; corners of mouth ulcerate and are the seat of eruptions. Chin covered with eruptions. Scabby eruptions on chin and around mouth. Painful nodules on lower jaw. Indurated swelling of submaxillary glands, painful to touch.

mouth.text: MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Erosion in the cavities of the teeth, [1] . ► Black acrid blood frequently comes from the hollow teeth, [4] . ► Pain in the right back teeth, on biting them tightly together, [1] . Expectoration : salty ; day and evening.

Ingrowing toe-nail. Drawing pains in limbs. Tearing pain in feet and hands ; in all the limbs. Falling asleep of arms and legs while sitting ; while walking, crawling in them. Limbs go "to sleep". Weakness of all the limbs. Startings of hands and feet. Heaviness in limbs. Paralyzed sensation of all the limbs. Hands and feet either hot or cold. Limbs drawn together, crooked, from bones being bent. skin.text: SKIN. ► Objective. ► Unhealthy skin; every small injury suppurates, [1] . ► Numerous red, itching spots over the whole body, especially on the calves, lasting seven days (twenty-fifth day), [4] . ►► *The skin of the hands is hard and cracked in several places , [1] . ► Spots here and there on the body, like fleabites, [1] . ► *Cracking of the lower lip , [1] . ► Eruptions, Dry. ► Small pimples without sensation break out over the whole body at night, and disappear in the morning, [4] . ► Red spot on the thigh, without any pain, [1] . ► *A red, raw spot like a tetter on the upper part of the thigh, opposite the scrotum, usually itching somewhat in the morning , [1] . ► Eruption on the lip, [1] . [1000.] ►► *Eruption in the corner of the mouth , [1] . ► *Chin covered with eruption , [1] . ► *Eruption on the penis , [1] . ► Gritty eruption on the fingers, [1] . ► Numerous red pimples on the thighs, which, however, only itch a little, [1] . ► Small white pimples on the upper lip, [1] . ► Hard white pimples on a red base, with some itching in both corners of the mouth under the lips, [1] . ► Hard pimples painful to pressure behind the right ear, for many days, [2] . ►► *Itching pimples on the face, becoming moist after scratching , [1] . ► Papulous eruption on the upper lip, which first itches and then burns, [1] . [1010.] ► Papulous eruption in the left nostril, which at first itches and then burns, [1] . ► Papulous eruption on the nates, painful to touch, [1] . ► Papulous eruption on the pudenda, with some itching, [1] . ► Eruptions, Moist. ► *Vesicular eruption on the prepuce , [1] . ► Vesicular eruption beneath the malleoli, [1] . ► A scattered eruption, consisting of deeply seated pimples, painful to pressure, which rapidly formed vesicles; these pimples appeared exclusively on the posterior surface of the thighs and legs (after one month), [6] . ► A vesicle on the upper lip, with cutting pain, [1] . ► *A vesicle on the little finger itches, suppurates, and discharges much matter, with burning and sticking, which, like the suppuration, continued a long time , [1] . ► A white blister on one toe, [4] . ►► *Itching eruption full of corrosive water in many parts of the body , for twelve hours, [4] . [1020.] ► Some small pimples appear on the trunk and upper part of the thighs (possibly caused by the warm weather, a not unusual symptom with me); after three days, however, this eruption assumed a peculiar appearance, the pimples increased to the size of a pin's head, and became filled with fluid at the tip, and were brownish yellow (during the latter part of the proving), [6] . ► Much moist papulous eruption on the nose, [1] . ►► *Itching and moist eruption on the scrotum , [1] . ► Erysipelas of the hands, [1] . ► *Erysipelas of both sides of the face, burning-sticking pain , followed by catarrh, for one day, with sticking in the gum (seventh and fourteenth days), [1] . ► A tetter becomes an inflamed swelling for four days, [1] . ► (The tetter behind the ears desquamates and becomes better), [2] . ► (A tetter on the leg disappears), [2] . ► *Numerous small red itching pimples tipped with pus, which burn after scratching , and disappear the next day, [4] . ► Small pustules on the chin and chest, [4] . [1030.] ► Large pustules, with sticking pains on both little toes, [1] . ► Suppuration of the margins of both great toes, [1] . ► Several small boils on the neck, back, and arms, [1] . ► A boil on the nates (after four days), [1] . ► An ulcer on the fourth toe, [1] . ► Scaly ulcer upon the tibia, with red inflamed border, and surrounded by swelling; it is so sensitive that at night the bed-covering cannot be endured, [1] . ► *Proud flesh in ulcers , [1] . ► Offensive odor from an ulcer (after twenty days), [1] . ► The scab of an ulcer smells like herring-brine, [1] . ► Numerous boils on the neck, which disfigure it like a large goitre, disappearing after some days, [1] . ► Subjective. [1040.] ► Itching of the whole body, and after scratching small pimples, which contain water (seventeenth day), [4] . ► *The itching becomes general and very violent, even on the face and genitals , [1] . ► A momentary, corrosive itching here and there, which provokes scratching, [1] . ► Burning pain in old scars from ulcers, [1] . ► Pressure and sticking in an ulcer (third day), [1] . ► Itching pressure in an ulcer (after fifth day), [1] . ► Tearing in an ulcer (fifth day), [1] . ► *Painful soreness between the pudendum and thigh, covered with pimples, vesicles, and ulcers , [1] . ► An ulcer becomes exceedingly sensitive, [1] . ► Smarting of the limbs covered with tetter, [1] . [1050.] ► Painful smarting all over the hands; on moving the fingers the skin cracks, [1] . ► Tingling of the feet towards the toes, like a slight tearing (after fifth day), [1] . ► Formication on the back, [1] . ► Itching of the right temple, very violent, with burning after scratching, [2] . ► Itching of the lobules of the ears and of the cheeks; after scratching lymph exudes, which hardens on these places, [1] . ► *Itching behind the ears , [1] . ► Itching of the back and arms, during the day, [1] . ► *Itching on the scrotum , [1] . ► Itching of the balls of the left hand, [1] . ► Itching on the leg where the veins were swollen, [1] . [1060.] ► Itching in the swollen varices of the limbs, [1] . ► Itching of all the toes, [1] . ► Violent itching on the coccyx, above the anus, with moisture and formation of a scurfy place, [1] . ► Sticking itching on the thigh, as if an eruption would break out in the place of a previous boil, [1] . ► Sticking itching in the right great toe, [4] . ► Frequent sticking itching, like fleabites, transiently relieved by rubbing, in a mole, [1] .

Rough, hard, persistent dryness of portions of skin unaffected by eczema. Early stage of keloid and fibroma. Pimples and acne. Eruptions, oozing out a sticky exudation. Rawness in bends of limbs, groins, neck, behind ears. Unhealthy skin; every little injury suppurates. Ulcers discharging a glutinous fluid, thin and sticky. Swelling and induration of glands. Gouty nodosities. Cracks in nipples, mouth, between toes, anus. Phlegmonous erysipelas of face; burning and stinging pain. Swelling of feet. Wens. Chronic Poison Oak

Obstinate dryness of the skin, and absence of perspiration. Ephelides. Red spots on the skin, like flea-bites. Erysipelatous inflammations. Vesicular erysipelas, like zona, on the abdomen and on the back. Itching of the varices on the lower limbs. Itching-stinging on the surface of a mole. Eruptions oozing out a thick honey-like fluid. Tetters, and other humid or scabby eruptions, sometimes with secretion of corrosive serum, or with itching in the evening, and at night. Eruption of pimples and nodules (principally under hair and on covered parts) which itch very much. Swelling and induration of the glands. Encysted tumours. Corrosive nodules. Excoriation of the skin (in the bends of the limbs, groins, neck, behind the ears), esp. in children. Unhealthy skin, every injury tending to ulceration. Proud flesh, and fetid pus, in ulcers, with tearing pains, burning, and shooting. Scrofulous and syphilitic ulcers. Burning pain in an old cicatrix. Deformity and thickness of the nails.

Itching over various parts of body. Itching becomes general and very violent, even on face and genitals. Great itching, as though foreign matter would pass through skin. Continual itching, < at night ; nothing visible upon skin before scratching, which produces nodules and long welts. Violent itching and burning, with eruptions. Nightly heat. θ Keratitis. Prurigo in children, with sore, raw places on skin. Long-lasting want of proper transpiration. Harsh, rough skin, disposed to chafing. Skin dry, inclined to crack. Excoriation of skin, especially in children. Raw, moist places between fingers and on face. Unhealthy skin ; every injury suppurates. Skin is not inclined to heal, ulcerates readily. Cracks or fissures of ends of fingers and nipples, labial commissures, of anus, between toes, etc. Irregular fissures about half an inch in length and one-eighth of an inch deep, looking like cuts with the edges closely in apposition ; no discharge ; on separating the edges a little a dirty, yellowish-white slough was seen looking like a piece of tape. Itching eruption full of corrosive water in many parts of body. Itching blotches on various parts of body, from which oozes a watery, sticky fluid. θ Uterine complaints. Erysipelas beginning in face and gradually spreading over whole body ; high fever. Erysipelas in women and young girls at time of, or instead of, menses. Erysipelas beginning on forehead and spreading thence to hairy scalp and neck ; vesicles also form which become dry. Erysipelas ; eruption assumes a vesicular appearance, or it exudes a transparent, glutinous fluid ; or assumes a chronic form. Erysipelatous inflammation, running in streaks. Erysipelas in face commencing on right side and extending to left. Sumach poisoning ; abdomen and knees affected. Varicosities itch very much, and have little pimples on surface of integument. Eruption behind ears, on various parts, from which ooze a watery, transparent, sticky fluid ; nails brittle, crumbling, deformed, painful and sore, as if ulcerated. Eczema, with profuse serous exudations ; in blondes inclined to obesity. Numerous small, red, itching pimples, tipped with pus, which burn after scratching. Eruption first like very light-colored elevations under skin, increasing without areola ; becoming pitted like early vaccine scab ; then itching and gets larger ; picked forms ulcerous scab ; ceases itching and dries up. Eruption of red spots, one inch in diameter, little elevated, but having milky, bluish-white vesicles, apparently papillary, one line in diameter, and not very high ; constantly tormented by violent itching and burning ; felt as if she must tear it with her nails, but only rubbed it, followed by such an aggravation that she wept ; face warm and flushed ; menses late, having been checked near end of last period by getting feet wet. Herpes exuding a sticky matter. Circular herpes feels hard to touch and wrinkled, situated in bend of left elbow, which itched terribly. Obstinate lupus of cheeks (improved). Leprous spots, coppery, annular, raised on face, ears, buttocks, legs and feet ; ulcers on toes, obduration of nose, crusts in nostrils. Callous ulcers of feet, originating from corroding blisters. Crusty and scabby ulcers ; pus bloody, watery, acrid and corroding, smelling like herring-brine. Sensitive, sore, spongy ulcers, with a salty discharge. Old ulcers, with fetid pus, proud flesh, itching, stinging. Old hard scars. Adenitis ; boils ; dandruff ; phlegmonous and vesicular erysipelas ; encysted tumors ; erythema ; eczema ; felons ; freckles ; falling off of hair ; zona ; herpes ; intertrigo ; lichen agrius ; prurigo ; nodosities ; scrofulosis ; scald head ; ulcers.

sleep.text: SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Frequent yawning (after one hour), [1] . ► Inclined to stretch and yawn without being able to stretch enough (after two days), [1] . ► Sleepiness during the day, with great weariness (after eleven days), [1] . ► Sleepiness after the midday meal , [1] . [1070.] ► Great sleepiness during the day , so that he must lie down, [1] . ► Very sleepy toward noon, [1] . ► Falls asleep very early in the evening, with great weariness, [1] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Restless nights, with heat (after twelve days), [1] . ► Restless nights, with heat of the whole body (first week), [4] . ► Restless at night, with anxious dreams, [1] . ► Restless night; she lies awake up to midnight, and can only fall asleep about 2 o'clock, [4] . ► She is unable to fall asleep before 2 A.M., [4] . ► Frequent waking at night, [4] . ► Frequent waking at night, as in slumber (fifteenth day), [1] . [1080.] ► Frequent waking, as from fright, [1] . ► Too early waking, [1] . ► Waking at 2 A.M., for several nights, with great uneasiness, [1] . ► She awoke about 3 A.M.; could not fall asleep again for two hours and awoke at 7, dizzy and tired, [1] . ► Frequent starting up in sleep, [4] . ► Anxious talking in sleep, [1] . ► Dreams. ► Constant dreamy nights, [4] . ► Vivid dream, remembered for a long time, [1] . ► Very vivid dreams, [1] . ► Sleep disturbed by dreams , [1] . [1090.] ► Voluptuous dreams (third day), [4] . ► She dreams only what she has seen and thought of during the day, [1] . ► Numerous dreams, with distorted images , in relation to everything which had happened to her during the last two days, [1] . ► Dreams fatiguing the head, [1] . ► Dreams full of trouble, [1] . ► Dreams of unpleasant things which had occurred during the day, on account of which she awoke with anxiety, [1] . ► Anxious dreams , from which she awakes with anxiety or fright, [4] . ► Anxious dreams, so that on waking she was quite beside herself, [1] . ► Very vivid, anxious dreams , [1] . ► Anxious dreams, which took away her breath; she cried out, and lay in perspiration, [1] . [1100.] ► Anxious dream, of numberless dogs and cats, with loud talking (twenty-second day), [6] . ► Anxious dreams of lethargy and loss of consciousness; afterwards very difficult waking from deep sleep, with stiffness of the cervical muscles, [1] . ► Peevish dreams , [1] . ► Peevish dreams, with moaning and groaning in sleep, [1] . ► Peevish, anxious dreams, [1] . ► Frightful dreams (fifth day), [1] . ► Anxious, frightful dreams, [1] . ► Frightful dreams, with danger from water, [4] . ► Dream of fire, [1] . ► Dreams of dead people (second night), [1] ; (twenty-ninth day), [4] .

Great drowsiness during the day, and early in the evening. Difficulty in falling asleep. Agitated sleep at night, with frequent waking. Nocturnal sleep incomplete, as if only dozing. Unable to fall asleep before midnight on account of a fixed idea. Unrefreshing sleep at night, followed in the morning by a comatose sleep. At night, profusion of ideas, sometimes troublesome. Great agitation at night, with anxious and frightful dreams, oppression and choking. During sleep, starts, with fright. Dreams of death and of fire; dreams with meditations. At night, discomforting ideas, anguish, heat, inquietude, startings, gastric sufferings, and many other affections. Perspiration about the head, when falling asleep. Bleeding from the nose at night. Wakens at night from a suffocative attack. Constant talking during sleep. Wetting the bed at night while asleep.

Constant yawning, with bloatedness of gastric region. Inclination to stretch, without being able to satisfy it sufficiently. Excessively tired and sleepy. Sleepiness : during day, must lie down ; after dinner. Perspiration about head, when falling asleep. Night-sweat. Constant talking during sleep. Wetting the bed at night while asleep. Wakens at night with a suffocative attack. Bleeding from nose at night. Light slumber or unrefreshing sleep ; starting ; wandering fancies. Nightly pains felt in sleep. Stupid morning sleep. Cannot go to sleep till late. Unable to fall asleep before midnight on account of a fixed idea. Sleepiness. Great sleepiness by day, goes to sleep early in evening, but during night there is wakefulness, tossing about, heat and anxiety ; dreams anxious and terrifying ; at last sinks into a profound and dull morning sleep. Great agitation at night ; anxious, frightful dreams. Sleep disturbed by dreams. Numerous dreams, with distorted images. Disturbed sleep. Dreams : vivid ; anxious ; horrible ; vexations ; about fatal accidents.

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. [1110.] ► Chilliness the whole day and at night; no sleep on account of chilliness, [1] . ► Chilliness in the morning in bed , [1] . ► Chilliness, in the morning in bed, for several mornings in succession, [1] . ► Chilliness for several days before the midday meal, [1] . ► Chilliness from 4 P.M. till in the evening after falling asleep (twenty-fourth day), [4] . ► Chilliness in the evening before going to sleep, followed by itching, [1] . ► Chilliness during the day, when lying down to sleep, [1] . ► Chilliness during menstruation, [1] . ► Immediately after menstruation, chilliness, cutting pain in the abdomen, followed by diarrha, [1] . ► Much chilliness, with cold hands and feet, [5] . [1120.] ► Much chilliness and shivering, especially coldness of the hands and feet, [1] . ► Violent febrile chilliness, in the morning and evening, then heat, followed by sweat, [1] . ► Coldness and shivering over the whole body after breakfast, [1] . ► Coldness of the whole body, after 5 P.M., with icy-cold feet, [1] . ► The child complained of coldness for half an hour every evening, [1] . ► Sudden coldness all over, [1] . ► Feeling of coldness, as from want of blood, [1] . ► Feeling of coldness and chilliness, with ringing in the ears (after a quarter of an hour), [1] . ► Cold shivers before and after eating, then anxious hoarseness in the evening for an hour and a half, [1] . ► Febrile shivers in the evening, with sticking pain in the temples, left ear, and teeth, followed by sweat at night, [1] . [1130.] ► Violent fever; he was unable to get warm, even in the evening, in the warm bed; violent thirst the whole evening and night; after midnight, profuse perspiration, lasting till morning; with the chilliness in the evening, headache and tearing in all the limbs, with coated tongue (thirty-sixth hour), [1] . ► Daily intermittent fever, shaking chill in the evening, followed after an hour by heat of the face and cold feet, without subsequent sweat, [1] . ► At night, chilliness and drawing pain in the limb, which awoke him, followed by sticking pain above the left breast and in the left side on every inspiration, [1] . ► Cold hands and feet, the whole day, in warm weather, [5] . ► Cold hands and feet, in the evening, with heat of the face (sixth day), [5] . ► Cold feet (after a few hours), [1] . ► The legs become suddenly cold after coition, [1] . ► Icy-cold feet the whole morning, [1] . ► Sometimes her feet are icy cold, again quite burning , [8] . ► Shivering in the back, in the forenoon, with frequent yawning and inclination to sleep, [1] . [1140.] ► Shivering in the right limb after the midday meal, [1] . ► Feverish shivers in the back several evenings, [1] . ► Heat. ► At night heat, and in the morning, on waking, orgasm of blood, [1] . ► He was unable to remain in bed at night on account of heat (fifth day), [1] . ► Is unable to sleep before midnight, on account of heat and anxiety, [1] . ► Becomes heated from riding in a wagon, [1] . ► Heat while sitting, frequently attacking him suddenly, sometimes with anxiety (seventeenth day), [1] . ► The whole body became burning hot, and he perspired all over, immediately after coition, [1] . ► Dry heat of the whole body, in the evening, lasting a quarter of an hour, [4] . ► Dry heat every evening and through the night till morning, with headache on the vertex and in the nape of the neck, lasting till noon (seventeenth day), [1] . [1150.] ► Hot hands, and heat and burning of the soles of the feet, so that she was almost unable to step, immediately, [1] . ► Sweat. ► Perspiration all over from an earnest conversation (after seven days), [1] . ► Perspiration, even on slight motion , in a person who usually never perspired (after four days), [1] . ► Perspiration, even after a short walk, which colors the linen yellow, with exhaustion, [1] . ► Sweat some mornings in bed, [1] . ► Night-sweat for several nights (removed by wine), [1] . ► Perspiration while eating, [1] . ► Profuse perspiration (thirty-fifth night); this perspiration seemed to occur without any cause, and although I was frequently awakened by cramps in the calves, it continued so great that in the morning not only the hair of the head, but the bed along the whole length of the body, was decidedly moist, [6] . ► Sour-smelling perspiration, [1] . ► She perspires much, a very sour, offensive sweat at night , [8] . [1160.] ► *Very offensive exhalations from the body , [1] . ► Sweat of the head while falling asleep, [1] . ► Perspiration on the sternum every morning, [1] . ► Sweat of the feet, most profuse in the afternoon and evening, [1] . ► Sweat of the feet , in the evening, with tearing in the feet and hands (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Profuse sweat on the feet; they begin to smell , [1] . ► Profuse sweat of the feet; they become sore, especially between the toes, so that he frequently does not know what to do with himself on account of the pain, [1] . ► Profuse sweat of the feet, when walking a little distance, which makes the toes sore, [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Irritable, etc.; confusion of head ; on waking, vertigo ; stupid in head; on waking, headache ; tearing in head; in bed, while half asleep, dull headache; in bed, pain in temple;
